faculty: Faculty of Agricultural and Environmental Sciences
program_name: Professional Agrology for Agribusiness Specialization (B.Sc.(Ag.Env.Sc.)) (24 credits)
description: This Specialization is required for students who wish to qualify for membership in the Ordre des agronomes du Québec (OAQ). It cannot be taken alone; it must be taken with the Major in Agricultural Economics and the Agribusiness Specialization. This Specialization focuses on working in the professional agribusiness industry and covers agricultural legislation as well as professional conduct. For information on academic advising, see: http://www.mcgill.ca/macdonald/studentinfo/advising .
